title: Landing-page trust signals and AEO
summary: Adds an above-the-fold trust/reassurance block, a persistent legal/trust footer, and an AEO-structured FAQ/definition layer to Anchor's landing page so answer engines can cite it.
notes: ADR-keyed deterministic filename suffix (adr0022) used: SHA-256 hashing tooling unavailable in classifier context. Slug is unique among ADRs, so no sibling-collision risk. Supersedes the earlier 0022-...-7f4a2c9e.json which carried an unverified (non-computed) hash suffix.
